title: openclaw.message.received
description: Inbound event from OpenClaw plugin after user interacts with a message (e.g. button press). Consumer verifies HMAC before processing.

envelope.description: JSON-encoded approval payload (or object). HMAC is computed over JCS canonical form.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex of canonical envelope with CORTEX_OPENCLAW_OUTBOUND_HMAC.

stage.description: Factory stage this response targets. If absent, read from parsed envelope.
